name: Badge

representativeVariants.desc: Red bg tint, red text — 紧张 status (remaining < 10%)
Amber bg tint, amber text — 可用但需管理 (10%-20%)
Blue bg tint, blue text — 舒适 (20%-40%)
Green bg tint, green text — 充裕 (> 40%)

structurePatterns: Background uses rgba tint (10% opacity) of status color
Text color matches status color at full opacity
usageHints: Used in result card to show storage status level
Status colors are semantic only — never used as decoration
Badge color must match the progress bar state color and mini result bar color
In S1 config state, badge is not shown (mini result bar provides feedback)
